pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly creates the project at this path.
Analyzed test_slicing.py generated in setup_task.sh. There are exactly 3 test functions and no parameterized fixtures, resulting in 3 total tests.
Verified in verifier.py which contains the explicit check 'passed = score >= 70'.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated STL data (a cube and a pyramid) created during environment setup. The project directory is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/py_slicer. The test suite contains exactly 3 tests, which contradicts the metadata claim of 8. A score of 70 is verified as the threshold to pass the task.
